verse_text: And behold, there was great earthquake; for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven, and came and rolled back the stone from the door, and sat on it.

links.context: See [[MAT.28:2]]. The stone is rolled away not to let the all-powerful Lord out, but to let us witness His Resurrection.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Amos preached repentance during a time of spiritual drought that preceded judgment ([[LUK.3:1]], [[LUK.3:2]]); indeed, Christ's Advent was an earthquake that shook the world ([[MAT.28:2]]), and the coming of the Holy Spirit a judgment by fire (vv. 4, 7, 10, 12, 14; 2:2, 5).

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
